expectations.text: CLAUDE.md contains a new directive about consistency passes after renames
expectations.evidence: CLAUDE.md contains '## Consistency Pass After Renames' with a four-step checklist

expectations.text: FEEDBACK_FOO.md FOO_1 is moved to Resolved section
expectations.evidence: FOO_1 appears under '## Resolved' heading with resolution note

expectations.text: FEEDBACK_FOO.md FOO_1 resolution notes what changed and where
expectations.evidence: Resolution says: 'Promoted to CLAUDE.md as Consistency Pass After Renames directive. Four-step checklist: search for old name, update all references, verify none remain, then proceed.'

expectations.text: Cross-reference between CLAUDE.md directive and FOO_1
expectations.evidence: CLAUDE.md directive has '<!-- managed by /foo -->' breadcrumb; FEEDBACK_FOO.md FOO_1 resolution points to CLAUDE.md; NOTES.md records the promotion decision referencing both FOO_1 and CLAUDE.md
